seo.title: What is the Pinbar Trading Strategy?
seo.description: The Pinbar candlestick pattern is a powerful price action signal that highlights sharp reversals and price rejection. This article explains how to identify valid Pinbars, trade them within trends, and combine them with key levels and indicators for higher-probability setups.
